arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola called me a killer but I knew my future wasn't at Man City - now I can make them pay

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker transfer latest: Zlatan Ibrahimovic on AC Milan January window strategy, with Marcus Rashford linked

arts.ttl: Juventus Make Another Bid For Fikayo Tomori Amid Milan’s Interest in Kyle Walker
arts.sum: Juventus are raising their efforts to acquire Milan's English centre-back Fikayo Tomori. The club are expected to ramp up discussions with both Milan and Tomori in the coming hours, aiming to finalize a deal that would see the player move to Turin. The post Juventus Make Another Bid For Fikayo Tomori Amid Milan’s Interest in Kyle Walker appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: What life could be like for Kyle Walker and Annie Kilner in Italy if Man City star moves to Milan
arts.sum: Milan is known as the city of fashion, but this month it could prove to be the city of footballing renaissance for one of England's most recognisable stars.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola accepts Erling Haaland deal may damage prospects of other players
arts.sum: New recruits may have to accept a back-up role or offer something different to get into Manchester City’s team.

arts.ttl: Man City's £1billion splurge signals end of historic Premier League charges case

arts.ttl: Man City scrap transfer plan as they advance on £250m move NOW for Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City's answer to their relative struggles is to splash the cash in the January transfer window, with £250million committed to re-energising Pep Guardiola's squad, and scrapping plans to wait for the club's new director of football
